title: DRMYN Studio: A Metadata-Only Human-Agent Film Production Workflow
description: DRMYN Studio is a metadata-only, schema-validated, human-gated pre-production and prompt governance pipeline for AI-assisted film production. Includes scene cards, character and location records, continuity files, prompt lifecycle infrastructure, JSON schema validation (20+ schemas, draft 2020-12), a three-agent autonomous orchestration layer (Claude Code / Codex / Gemini Code Assist) with auto-handoff and pickup mode enabling structured multi-agent coordination without external APIs, a Streamlit dashboard for operator oversight, and a Film Aesthetic Bible system that injects deterministic, scene-grounded visual keywords into T2I prompts via named aesthetic packs. All production decisions are reproducible and academically defensible; generated media outputs are stored externally and referenced by metadata-only records. Demonstrated through the Closing Price AI-assisted film project. Release v0.3.1 introduces the three-agent orchestration workflow with auto-handoff on operator approval, pickup mode for VS Code agent context transfer, and canonical asset storage policy schema with Git LFS governance for reference image intake.
